rationale: Verified `git diff 8b664359..196f07d2 -- internal/approve/*.go` touches only comment lines: a new explanatory block above the impl.go preflight (lines inside `//`), the TestApproveImpl_NoCommitsNoBeads doc comment, and a citation-only comment in orphan_gate_test.go. The test's executable body and assertions (error text, HasFinalRecoveryLine, FinalizeEpic call count) are byte-identical to round 1 — confirmed by reading the full function. The new impl.go comment truthfully documents exactly the dead-code/subsumption nit I flagged in round 1 at the preflight's `planErr != nil || len(beadIDs) == 0` disjunction: it explains readPlanBeadIDs errors on empty bead_ids (so the two disjuncts are equivalent), that Leg 3 already refuses on planErr!=nil before this preflight runs, making the refusal unreachable in normal flow, and that it's kept as a defensive backstop for the CONSENSUS-revision-9 call-order pin. Confirmed `grep -n MergeBase impl.go` → line 294 matches the corrected citation, with :249 correctly retained as the distinct pre-115 Fact-1 pin. Ran `go test -count=1 ./internal/approve ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/complete ./internal/executor ./internal/doctor ./cmd/mindspec` — all packages pass. My round-1 no-regression and deviations A-E verdicts (including C, the spec-mandated tightening) all still hold; nothing here alters gate behavior.
findings: Confirmed comment-only delta across impl.go, impl_test.go, orphan_gate_test.go (no executable/assertion lines changed)
impl.go preflight comment now accurately documents the Leg-3 subsumption / dead-code condition flagged in round 1
orphan_gate_test.go MergeBase citation corrected to impl.go:294 (verified via grep); :249 correctly preserved as the separate pre-115 Fact-1 pin
